options.content: Network-device traffic view only (`subject_type='network_device'`). FRITZ!Box WAN throughput is collected from Home Assistant and normalized to bytes/s; USW traffic comes from the local UniFi controller uplink stats.

panels.description: Receive/transmit throughput for network devices using the canonical Graphyard traffic metrics.

targets.query: SELECT mean("value") * 8 AS "receive_bps" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second' AND "traffic_scope" =~ /^$traffic_scope$/ GROUP BY time($__interval), "subject_id", "traffic_scope" fill(null)

SELECT mean("value") * 8 AS "transmit_bps" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_transmit_bytes_per_second' AND "traffic_scope" =~ /^$traffic_scope$/ GROUP BY time($__interval), "subject_id", "traffic_scope" fill(null)

panels.title: Device Traffic: $subject_id

targets.query: SELECT last("value") * 8 AS "receive_bps" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second' AND "traffic_scope" =~ /^$traffic_scope$/ GROUP BY "subject_id", "traffic_scope", "source_system"

SELECT last("value") * 8 AS "transmit_bps" FROM "graphyard_metrics" WHERE $timeFilter AND "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_transmit_bytes_per_second' AND "traffic_scope" =~ /^$traffic_scope$/ GROUP BY "subject_id", "traffic_scope", "source_system"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "subject_id" WHERE "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second'
list.label: subject_id
list.name: subject_id
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "subject_id" WHERE "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second'

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "traffic_scope" WHERE "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second'
list.label: traffic_scope
list.name: traffic_scope
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "graphyard_metrics" WITH KEY = "traffic_scope" WHERE "subject_type" = 'network_device' AND "subject_id" =~ /^$subject_id$/ AND "metric" = 'network_device.network_receive_bytes_per_second'
